name: inbox-triage
description: Scheduled inbox triage via Google C1 composition (C15)
config_hints: requires google connector (C1) with OAuth sidecar running

morning triage cron: { "id": "inbox-morning", "cron": "08:00", "text": "Inbox triage: use /mcp google gmail_search for unread last 24h; categorize urgent/action/fyi; write summary to workspace/inbox/today.md; create gmail_draft replies for urgent items only — never gmail_send", "session_id": "webchat:local" }
evening digest cron: { "id": "inbox-evening", "cron": "18:00", "text": "Summarize inbox actions completed today from workspace/inbox/today.md", "session_id": "webchat:local" }
